picks.quote: I still think Luke Fernandez is going to win this bout by finish... I'm going to go inside the distance here for Luke Fernandez.
I think Tobias should easily win this fight... we're going to take decision will will be fine for us, but obviously we expect there likely to be a finish for Rafael Tobias.
I got to believe Dante Johnson's going to be able to win this fight... we're going to go inside the distance for Dante Johnson.
I'll be going with Rodriguez to win this fight by knockout... I'm going to go inside the distance at minus 125 for Rodriguez.
Give me Michael Johnson... I think he's going to knock him out.
I think Max is going to win. I'll tell you that. I think Max is going to win by third round TKO.
